name: Comparison of Classes by Name
description: The product compares classes by name rather than by reference equality, allowing an attacker to supply a malicious class with the same name as a trusted class. Since multiple classes can share the same name across different class loaders, name-based comparison can be spoofed to execute unintended code.
detection_pattern: CONTROL node performing class identity check using TRANSFORM(string comparison) on class names rather than direct object reference comparison. Look for EXTERNAL(class)→TRANSFORM(getName)→CONTROL(equals) without AUTH(reference equality check).
